/CAL:RESTITUTION HEARING/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO MAKE RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIMHANNAH KLEMPNER IN THE AMOUNT OF $250,00/X:A CR-110 & 111 ARE SIGNED, FILED & SERVED/

/CAL:PROOF OF COMPLETION/NP/X:THE DEFENSE HAS SUBMITTED INSURANCE DOCUMENTS TO PASS ALONG TO APD VICTIM RESTITUTION TO AID IN THEIR DETERMINATION/30CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT:08-28-18/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 2D/CTS:2/4019HALF/PF390 12/VF2:150/FOP1:3MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLYSET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:MARZAN WEESE SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR MICHAEL MEEHAN/ /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/OR/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT NOT TO DRIVE WITH ANY MEASURABLE AMOUNT OF ALCOHOL IN SYSTEM/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE, SET OR DISPO, JURY TRIAL/DOPC/
/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/CONTD:RESTITUTION HEARING/TE:15 MINUTES/DOPU:DEFENDANT WAIVES HER RIGHTS TO BE PRESENT/
/CAL:TO SET/DAWT/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL HAS NEITHER APPEARED NOR CONTACTED THECOURT RE: HIS ABSENCE/CONTD:RESTITUTION HEARING/TE:15 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL:APD RESTITUTION REPORT/DAWT/X:THE DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETED HER DUI CALSS/CONTD:TO SET/DAWF/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/
